message:
feat: Add context pool foundation for adaptive context budget

- Implement ContextPool with 4-tier system (512/1024/2048/4096 tokens)
- Add PooledContext wrapper with lifecycle tracking
- Implement pool operations: init, acquire, release, migrate
- Add memory-aware tier capacity calculation
- Include KV cache migration between contexts
- Add pool statistics and monitoring

Part of Phase 1: Adaptive Context Budget implementation
